title: Assigning list to JSON field fails in Python Code node
symptom: When trying to assign a list of dictionaries to a JSON field in the Python Code node, the assignment results in 'None'.
applies_when: Assigning a list to a JSON field
not_this_if: Using intermediary string conversion with json.dumps
root_cause: The Python Code node in n8n does not handle direct assignment of lists to JSON fields correctly, resulting in the field being set to None instead of the intended list.
fix_steps: Add a new node after the Python Code node
Set the new node to 'Edit Fields' mode
Manually map the 'content_list' field to '{{ JSON.parse($json.content_list) }}'
agent_instruction: Create an Edit Fields node to map 'content_list' using JSON.parse.
